metaTitle: Import CSV to Table Online — Free | {{BRAND_NAME}}
metaDescription: Import any CSV file into a clean, editable table. {{BRAND_NAME}} reads your file, detects headers, and builds the table instantly. Free, no signup.
heroHeadline: Turn a CSV into an editable table in seconds.
heroSubtext: Upload your CSV and Tablesmit builds the full table automatically. Headers detected, columns set, data ready to edit and export.

benefits.heading: Instant import
benefits.body: Tablesmit reads your CSV using PapaParse and generates the table immediately. No configuration, no column mapping — it just works.

benefits.heading: Safe and private
benefits.body: Your CSV file is read entirely in the browser. Nothing is uploaded to a server. Your data never leaves your machine.

benefits.heading: Edit after import
benefits.body: Once imported, the table is fully editable. Resize columns, merge cells, apply themes, change column types — then export in any format.

benefits.heading: Large file handling
benefits.body: Files up to 5MB are supported. If the CSV exceeds 100,000 cells, Tablesmit clamps to the maximum table size and notifies you.

steps.heading: Open the import menu
steps.body: Click the Import button in the toolbar and choose 'Import from CSV'.

steps.heading: Select your file
steps.body: Choose your .csv file. Tablesmit reads the file, detects headers in the first row, and builds the table.

steps.heading: Edit and export
steps.body: Your table is ready to edit. Style it, resize columns, add a caption — then export to PDF, Excel, or PNG.

useCases: Converting exported CSV data from a database into a presentation-ready table
Importing survey results and formatting them for a report
Taking CSV output from a research tool and styling it for publication
Cleaning and reformatting legacy CSV data before sharing
